params.name: Owl Brother's Badge
params.description: Owl Brother's original name is Garcia. He was once a police officer, and that was when he was given the badge. He was later ordered to work as an undercover agent in a mafia. The badge was carefully put away and has witnessed his double life and all the dangers that he overcame.
